plugin_desc: Yeastar IP PBX and VoIP gateway SNMP baseline child template. This child template relies on the shared VoiceGateway SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. The Yeastar enterprise root and gateway product family are verified, but stable shared CPU, memory, temperature, fan and power health leaf OIDs and enum meanings are not fully verified in this pass, so they are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: VoiceGateway
